name: memorix
description: Shared workspace memory for Codex and other AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Shared local memory for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Memorix gives Codex durable workspace memory through MCP tools, lightweight usage guidance, and optional lifecycle capture.
defaultPrompt: Use Memorix to recover prior workspace context.
